description_long: This is a large, detached residential house surrounded by a fenced yard and lush landscaping, including several trees and bushes. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several chimneys and dormers, and a mix of window sizes distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The front includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a driveway leading to a two-car garage. The backyard area contains a patio with outdoor furniture and what appears to be a small round pool or hot tub, as well as additional garden space. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, with dark trim on the windows, doors, and fencing. The property is enclosed by a modern, horizontal-slat fence, providing both privacy and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A large, multi-gabled house with a fenced yard, lush landscaping, and a prominent entryway with a garage. The exterior is light-colored with dark trim and features a mix of windows, a patio, and a small pool or hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, two-car garage, and landscaped front yard with a prominent fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the length of the house with visible windows and a covered patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, small round pool or hot tub, and additional garden space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear fence, more landscaping, and the overall depth of the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, and decorative overhang
